name: Interlapse Technologies Corp.
summary: Interlapse Technologies Corp., a financial technology applications company, focuses on the development of various Web-based platforms, solutions, and applications. It operates coincurve.com, a virtual currency software platform that enables customers to purchase bitcoin. The company was formerly known as Coronado Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Interlapse Technologies Corp. in May 2019. Interlapse Technologies Corp. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
